allow: Bash(env -u REQUESTS_CA_BUNDLE -u SSL_CERT_FILE pre-commit install --install-hooks --hook-type commit-msg --hook-type pre-commit)
Bash(env -u REQUESTS_CA_BUNDLE -u SSL_CERT_FILE pre-commit run commitlint --hook-stage commit-msg --commit-msg-filename /dev/stdin)
Bash(env -u REQUESTS_CA_BUNDLE -u SSL_CERT_FILE npx --yes --package @commitlint/cli --package @commitlint/config-conventional commitlint --config commitlint.config.mjs)
Bash(node -e "console.log\('node tls default works if no error'\)")
Bash(echo "mkcert path: $\(command -v mkcert || echo 'NOT on PATH'\)")
Bash(grep -nE 'brew shellenv|HOMEBREW|/opt/homebrew|path_helper' ~/.zshrc /etc/zprofile 2>/dev/null; echo "=== total lines in .zshrc ==="; wc -l ~/.zshrc)
Bash(python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.github/workflows/ci.yml'\)\); print\('ci.yml OK — jobs:', list\(d['jobs'].keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.github/workflows/docs.yml'\)\); print\('docs.yml OK — jobs:', list\(d['jobs'].keys\(\)\)\)")
